title: MUSIC VIDEO RENDER E — Ginger + Joe hot-dog heist duet (Two Dogs One Dream)
reuseAssetNote: ONE 10s render, paired with Suno song 'Two Dogs One Dream.mp3' via loopVideoWithSong.mjs to fill the 60s music block. Loop choreography is rhythmic doo-wop dog dance with hot-dog props on the ground.
prompt: Wide cinematic doo-wop comedy shot in @backyard — green grass, leafy backyard tree, black iron fence, sunny afternoon. A small pile of three plump cartoon HOT DOGS in buns sits on the grass FOREGROUND-CENTER like loot. @Ginger (small Jack Russell with a red collar) already standing on the LEFT of the hot-dog pile, ALL FOUR PAWS firmly planted on the green grass throughout the entire clip. @Joe (fluffy Pomeranian with a blue collar) already standing on the RIGHT of the hot-dog pile, ALL FOUR PAWS firmly planted on the green grass throughout the entire clip. Both dogs face the camera at slight angles, mouths open in cheerful doo-wop sing-along expression — but their mouths stay EMPTY (no hot dogs in mouths, no holding objects with mouths). STRICT ANATOMY: each dog has EXACTLY 4 PAWS firmly in contact with the ground at all times. Both dogs perform a synchronized loop-clean doo-wop dance: gentle head-bob to the left, gentle head-bob to the right, tail-wag right, tail-wag left, both lift their FRONT-RIGHT paw briefly and tap the ground, both lift their FRONT-LEFT paw briefly and tap the ground, then return to standing facing the camera. The hot-dog pile stays put on the grass between them — the dogs do NOT pick them up, do NOT chew them, do NOT touch them with their mouths during the loop. Background atmosphere: sparse cartoon HOT-DOG-shape confetti drifts gently down through the frame, soft sock-hop atmosphere. Movements are RHYTHMIC and LOOPABLE — clean cycle: head-bob → head-bob → tail-wag → tail-wag → paw-tap → paw-tap → return. Camera locked, head-on, dog-eye-level low angle. Bright cheerful summer afternoon lighting. The two dogs hum and sing along generically — generic happy dog-vocalization mouth movements, no specific lip-sync to specific words. Designed to LOOP cleanly: both dogs return to identical starting pose at second 0 and second 10. No audible speech, no music — silent render. The grass remains VISUALLY CLEAN throughout — no marks, no spills, no stains, no red anywhere.
